tests.text: Your link elements should be inside your head element.
Your three link elements should have a rel attribute with the value stylesheet.
One of your link elements should have the href set to https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Anton%7CBaskervville%7CRaleway&display=swap.
One of your link elements should have the href set to https://use.fontawesome.com/releases/v5.8.2/css/all.css.
One of your link elements should have the href set to styles.css.

description:
U ovom radionici, kreiraćete stranicu magazina koristeći saopštenje za medije iz prethodne verzije kurikuluma freeCodeCamp-a.

Počnite dodavanjem elementa link za font stilski list https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Anton%7CBaskervville%7CRaleway&display=swap, link za FontAwesome stilski list https://use.fontawesome.com/releases/v5.8.2/css/all.css, i link za vaš ./styles.css stilski list.

Vaš font stilski list će učitati tri odvojena fonta: Anton, Baskervville i Raleway.
